data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires a deterministic validation of the custom reminder schedule, but the evidence provided does not include any specific outcomes or results from simulating this scenario. The expected result states that the scenario behavior should be confirmed or produce a clear failure report, yet there is no indication of whether this validation was successfully executed or what the results were. Therefore, the evidence is inconclusive regarding the satisfaction of the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of the simulation results for the custom reminder schedule.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Simulate custom reminder schedule
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Confirm the behavior of the custom reminder schedule and capture the outcome.
